title: ailanthus integrifolia subsp. integrifolia
intro: Ailanthus integrifolia subsp. integrifolia, also known as the Chinese tree of heaven, is a deciduous tree native to China that is now widely cultivated and naturalized in many parts of the world. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Ailanthus integrifolia subsp. integrifolia include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as protection against infections and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant's leaves and bark can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these preparations.
